iot.topicrule.s3action.CfnAbout: Describes an action to write data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

iot.topicrule.s3action.CannedAcl.Description: The Amazon S3 canned ACL that controls access to the object identified by the object key. For more information, see [S3 canned ACLs](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/acl-overview.html#canned-acl).

iot.topicrule.s3action.Key.Description: The object key. For more information, see [Actions, resources, and condition keys for Amazon S3](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/list_amazons3.html).

iot.topicrule.s3action.RoleArn.Description: The ARN of the IAM role that grants access.
